name: Baskets
notes: Looked up by BuyerId (cookie GUID or authenticated username) via BasketWithItemsSpecification; every select eagerly loads the BasketItems navigation collection via .Include(b => b.Items).
Row inserted lazily on first visit or first add-to-basket — whichever triggers GetOrCreateBasketForUser or AddItemToBasket first. Updated by AddItemToBasket and SetQuantities after entity mutations.

name: BasketItems
notes: Always read via the .Include(b => b.Items) eager load on the Baskets query — never queried as a standalone table by this feature.

Rows inserted by basket.AddItem() in AddItemToBasket; quantity updated by item.SetQuantity() in SetQuantities; rows with Quantity=0 deleted by basket.RemoveEmptyItems() before the UpdateAsync call in SetQuantities.

name: CatalogItems
notes: GetByIdAsync by single Id in OnPost — used exclusively to resolve CatalogItem.Price server-side; the price submitted by the client form is discarded.

ListAsync with CatalogItemsSpecification (WHERE Id IN [...]) in GetBasketItems — fetches Name and PictureUri for rendering the basket row display; called on every OnGet, OnPost, and OnPostUpdate that reloads the basket view.
